raw_input: Write a bug report (80–120 words) with exactly three labeled sections in this order: 'Steps:', 'Expected:', 'Actual:'. Each section gets its own short paragraph. The bug: on Safari 17.4 (macOS), clicking the 'Save Draft' button in the blog post editor clears the editor body instead of saving it — but ONLY when the post title contains an emoji. No other browser or title state reproduces it. Write in direct engineering-style prose, no sugar-coating.
success_criteria: three labeled sections: 'Steps:', 'Expected:', 'Actual:' in that order
mentions Safari 17.4 and the emoji-in-title trigger condition
constraints: no markdown headers, no filler openings
